name: Chef Freddy's Fruited Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Season with salt and pepper, then brown in a skillet in the oil for 10 minutes on each side. Drain.
2. Combine the pie filling, wine, lime juice, brown sugar, and spices in a bowl and mix well.
3. Arrange the chicken in a microwave-safe casserole dish and spoon the fruit sauce over it. Cover and nuke on low setting for 20 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink and is fork tender.
4. Serve over hot cooked noodles or rice.
